data.body: DECISION (per maintainer): KEEP as reference, not delete. Maintainer intends to implement Jira onboarding & configuration; this plugin-era credential-detection helper is the groundwork. Relocated jira-credential-helper.sh + its test out of src/rebar/_engine and tests/ into scripts/jira-onboarding-reference/ (outside the wheel's packages=[src/rebar] and outside pytest testpaths), relabeled header as REFERENCE/GROUNDWORK, repointed the test at the co-located helper (10/10 pass), and added a README. Follow-up feature story vein-acid-navy created and linked discovered_from this ticket.
